{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Brand-new operating system manufactured by Snail Industries and installed on the Sky Destroyer to fantastic results. The only flaw being it would automatically update at the preset time, even in battle...
|affct=TECH
|hard=DEF
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=6530
|relic1=Parker Solar Probe
|relic2=Energy Missile
|relic3=SAGE
|relic4=Wilford's Engine
|relic5=CAL 9000
}}
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=6
|fire=7
|wind=7
|form=Mecha
|element=Wind
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=HP
}}
